chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-1959 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING. 1. For orders on Misc. No.14133 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of Misc. No.9690 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 14.07.2025 Barrister Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- In the morning, we declined in open Court permission in the pending cases and only in fresh cases of an urgent nature permission was granted which too was subject to the real urgency. However, learned counsel has managed to bring this matter before the Court by showing the staff as fresh one. On perusal of the file it reflects that on 14.05.2025 notices were issued and on 22.05.2025 again matter was fixed in the Court as date by Court and was adjourned. We are also of the view that the matter is not of an urgent nature requiring hearing during the Summer Vacations. In the circumstances, the urgent application is dismissed with costs of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand only), to be paid by the Petitioner and deposited in the account of the High Court Clinic JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
